title: Horror+
description: This new modpack adds lots of the most popular horror mods. We hope you'll enjoy this new modpack! Have fun, and get scared.
body:
# WARNING! THIS MODPACK CHANGES YOUR SYSTEM WALLPAPER TO A DISTURBING IMAGE! PLEASE NOTE THAT IT CAN BE VERY DISTURBING FOR SOME AUDIENCES!

# Welcome to Horror+

This modpack has over 20 of the most popular horror mods for Minecraft 1.19.2. It comes with some eerie, scary shaders. Enjoy our newest creation!
